作者文笔特别好 我是从来不看任何娱乐圈文 娱乐圈位面都是直接跳的，但是这个小说第一个就是娱乐圈我还是看完了，感情线特别细腻，女主虽然外表又娇又软但是内心很有主见，而且也不弱，有自保实力也不会像其他女主那种一直只能依附男主，而且也没有乱七八糟的苍蝇（女配男配搞雌竞雄竞）强推！！","text_exts":[{"e":22,"s":19,"text":"娱乐圈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425904168A31C74%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227273149919316476713%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227258125727512398909%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693412413,"group_id":"7258125727512398909","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小乖，愿我们的悲伤都化为乌有(⑅˃◡˂⑅)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6NoRjhzXmNZHld9vSxNz6bJ9fn/UhtOYaNhE8t/jU9c","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/97a893ac10f0483187bb267d3802ba2e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794735&x-signature=0b70TFb%2BPAkGZMoQFIvMcB6Ug%2FM%3D","user_id":"3241797592300110","user_name":"甜文重度依赖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3241797592300110","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7258125727512398909","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿➕1v1➕男主恋爱脑➕男主自我攻略➕女主可娇可媚➕双洁➕无误会】
槿颜发现这世间有些无聊，自己似乎忘记了什么，却又想不起来。

有一天睡醒，莫名被一个白软软的小团子绑定，说要去搜集一个人的碎片，这样就能把她失去的记忆给找回来。
她对救人没兴趣，对记忆倒是有一些小兴趣，可是谁能告诉她，为什么每次摆烂的时候总有人自我攻略说要娶她爱她宠她？

清冷影帝为了她参加恋综：乖乖，我终于找到你了。
邻居家暴躁症弟弟：姐姐～你抱抱我，抱一下我就不打架了。
沉睡了千年的魔君：软软，三界之内无人及你。
乡下糙汉：娇娇，我真的好喜欢你呀～
自闭症电竞天才少年：甜甜，我以前对所有东西都没有执念，直到我遇到了你。
冷面帝王：乖宝，江山又怎能和你相比。
末世偏执大佬：崽崽，我不敢自己睡觉，你陪陪我好不好？
民国病娇少帅：娇宝，你是我唯一的玫瑰。


槿颜每次都揉着自己的腰说：“我只是想摆烂，没想谈恋爱！！”
洛渊：我的灵魂碎成了很多片，每一片都爱上了同一个人。

系统两个都在女主识海里，一个男主系统一个女主系统，两人挺可爱的，和女主一样都是爱吃[思考]
男女主有一对龙凤胎，可以说男女主是为了孩子才进小世界的，所以小世界也可以生孩子的，有时候两个孩子都出现，有时候一个[害羞]","text_exts":[{"e":29,"s":25,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177425904168A31C74%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227324204020867023627%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227258125727512398909%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705299980,"group_id":"7258125727512398909","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只看快穿小甜文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Kf3mFfOTTQh2POIQdkQH8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8bf82c012b9f4fa8bb9486a92e13578c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787241&x-signature=zNdyRgJm%2Fqn0Uor%2BKUc0BASCiz8%3D","user_id":"792084129517224","user_name":"土九"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"792084129517224","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7258125727512398909","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿➕1v1➕男主恋爱脑➕男主自我攻略➕女主可娇可媚➕双洁➕无误会】

槿颜每次都揉着自己的腰说：“我只是想摆烂，没想谈恋爱！！”
洛渊：我的灵魂碎成了很多片，每一片都爱上了同一个人。
